behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, flag names (debug, debug_build), script names (devtools:build:chrome:debug, devtools:build:firefox:debug), and command-line flag (--//devtools:debug) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior without providing exact code or diffs; agent must still figure out bool_flag, config_setting, and esbuild wrapper implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for bazel query results, behavioral build success, and presence of sourcemap='inline' and absence of minify=True — alternative valid implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute bazel query and bazel build --nobuild commands, not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual bazel flag registration, working build configuration, and specific JSON scripts — stubs would not satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 5 requirements from instruction.md are covered by test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Test functions are individually named by purpose (test_debug_flag_exists, test_sourcemap_inline_for_injected_scripts, etc.).

structured_data_schema.reason: package.json script keys required are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and flag names are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to edit but does not pinpoint buggy lines; file locations are inherent to the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized edits to BUILD.bazel files and package.json, not full rewrites.
